jp.tepco.denkiyoho.SupplyCapacity.name: SupplyCapacity
jp.tepco.denkiyoho.SupplyCapacity.description: Daily TEPCO Electricity Forecast supply capability reference record for the Tokyo service area.

jp.tepco.denkiyoho.PeakDemandForecast.name: PeakDemandForecast
jp.tepco.denkiyoho.PeakDemandForecast.description: Daily TEPCO Electricity Forecast maximum-demand forecast record for the Tokyo service area.

jp.tepco.denkiyoho.DemandActual.name: DemandActual
jp.tepco.denkiyoho.DemandActual.description: Actual electricity demand record from TEPCO Electricity Forecast for the Tokyo service area, emitted for hourly rows with section 3 context and for five-minute rows with section 5 solar context.

jp.tepco.denkiyoho.DemandForecast.name: DemandForecast
jp.tepco.denkiyoho.DemandForecast.description: Hourly electricity demand forecast record from TEPCO Electricity Forecast for the Tokyo service area.

JP.TEPCO.Denkiyoho.Info.description: Retained reference information for MQTT/AMQP topic discovery.

SupplyCapacity.name: SupplyCapacity

date.description: Service date for TEPCO's Electricity Forecast daily CSV in local Tokyo time, normalized from the DATE column to ISO 8601 calendar-date form (YYYY-MM-DD). This date is a stable key component for all records from the same operating day.

time.description: Record time component retained in the payload for dedupe and downstream interpretation. Supply capacity is daily reference data rather than a point-in-time demand measurement, so the bridge sets this field to the sentinel value _supply_capacity_ while Kafka partitioning and CloudEvent subjects use the stable area_code identity.

peak_supply_capacity_mw.description: Peak-time available supply capability for the Tokyo service area shown by TEPCO as ピーク時供給力(万kW). The bridge converts the published 10,000-kilowatt unit to megawatts by multiplying the source value by 10.

peak_supply_capacity_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer value from TEPCO's ピーク時供給力(万kW) header field. TEPCO publishes demand and supply values in 万kW, where one unit is 10,000 kilowatts, equal to 10 megawatts.

peak_time_slot.description: Local Japan Standard Time hour range from TEPCO's section 1 時間帯 column indicating the peak supply-capability time slot, normalized to an ASCII hyphen such as 13:00-14:00.

peak_reserve_margin_pct.description: Peak-time reserve margin percentage from TEPCO's section 1 ピーク時予備率(%) column for the published peak supply-capability slot.

peak_usage_pct.description: Peak-time usage percentage from TEPCO's section 1 ピーク時使用率(%) column for the published peak supply-capability slot.

daily_max_usage_pct.description: Daily maximum usage percentage from TEPCO's section 4 最大使用率(%) summary row. The field is null when that section is absent or blank in the CSV.

daily_max_usage_time_slot.description: Local Japan Standard Time hour range from TEPCO's section 4 時間帯 column for the daily maximum usage percentage, normalized to an ASCII hyphen such as 4:00-5:00. The field is null when that section is absent or blank.

update_datetime.description: Section 1 supply-capability information update timestamp converted from Japan Standard Time to UTC and serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp. TEPCO publishes the date and time in 供給力情報更新日 and 供給力情報更新時刻.

update_datetime_local.description: Section 1 supply-capability information update timestamp in Japan Standard Time serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp with +09:00 offset, built from TEPCO's 供給力情報更新日 and 供給力情報更新時刻 columns.

area_code.description: Constant service-area code TEPCO assigned by this bridge for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area covered by the Electricity Forecast page.

area_name_jp.description: Japanese name of the TEPCO Power Grid service area used by the Electricity Forecast page: 東京電力エリア. The page defines this as Tokyo plus Kanagawa, Saitama, Chiba, Tochigi, Gunma, Ibaraki, Yamanashi, and the portion of Shizuoka east of the Fujikawa River.

area_name_en.description: English display name for the TEPCO service territory covered by the Electricity Forecast page: TEPCO Service Area (Kanto).

SupplyCapacity.description: Daily reference schema for TEPCO Electricity Forecast supply capability and daily maximum-usage summary metadata. The source CSV is Shift-JIS encoded and section 1 reports peak supply capacity, reserve margin, usage percentage, and update time for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area.

PeakDemandForecast.name: PeakDemandForecast

date.description: Operating date for TEPCO's section 2 peak-demand forecast, normalized from 予想最大電力情報更新日 with the CSV update year to ISO 8601 calendar-date form (YYYY-MM-DD). This is the stable date key component.

time.description: Record time component retained in the payload for the section 2 peak-demand forecast. The bridge sets this field to the sentinel value _peak_forecast_ so the daily peak forecast remains distinguishable without pretending to be an hourly measurement; Kafka partitioning and CloudEvent subjects use the stable area_code identity.

peak_demand_forecast_mw.description: Forecast maximum electricity demand for the Tokyo service area from TEPCO's section 2 予想最大電力(万kW) row, converted from 万kW to megawatts by multiplying by 10.

peak_demand_forecast_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer peak-demand forecast value from TEPCO's section 2 予想最大電力(万kW) field.

peak_time_slot.description: Local Japan Standard Time hour range from TEPCO's section 2 時間帯 column indicating when the forecast maximum demand is expected, normalized to an ASCII hyphen such as 13:00-14:00.

update_datetime.description: Section 2 peak-demand forecast information update timestamp converted from Japan Standard Time to UTC and serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp. TEPCO publishes the date and time in 予想最大電力情報更新日 and 予想最大電力情報更新時刻.

update_datetime_local.description: Section 2 peak-demand forecast information update timestamp in Japan Standard Time serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp with +09:00 offset, built from TEPCO's 予想最大電力情報更新日 and 予想最大電力情報更新時刻 columns.

area_code.description: Constant service-area code TEPCO assigned by this bridge for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area covered by the Electricity Forecast page.

area_name_jp.description: Japanese name of the TEPCO Power Grid service area used by the Electricity Forecast page: 東京電力エリア. The page defines this as Tokyo plus Kanagawa, Saitama, Chiba, Tochigi, Gunma, Ibaraki, Yamanashi, and the portion of Shizuoka east of the Fujikawa River.

area_name_en.description: English display name for the TEPCO service territory covered by the Electricity Forecast page: TEPCO Service Area (Kanto).

PeakDemandForecast.description: Daily reference schema for TEPCO Electricity Forecast section 2 peak-demand forecast metadata for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area.

DemandActual.name: DemandActual

date.description: Operating date from the DATE column in TEPCO's hourly actual-demand section or five-minute actual-demand section, normalized to ISO 8601 calendar-date form (YYYY-MM-DD). This is the first stable key component.

time.description: Local Japan Standard Time clock time from the TIME column in TEPCO's hourly or five-minute actual-demand section, normalized to zero-padded HH:MM form. This is the second stable key component.

datetime.description: Combined DATE and TIME converted from Japan Standard Time to UTC and serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp for cross-region analytics.

datetime_local.description: Combined DATE and TIME serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp with +09:00 offset for the Japan Standard Time instant represented by the TEPCO CSV row.

actual_demand_mw.description: Actual electricity demand for the Tokyo service area, converted to megawatts from TEPCO's 当日実績(万kW) hourly column or 当日実績(5分間隔値)(万kW) five-minute column by multiplying by 10.

actual_demand_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer value from TEPCO's 当日実績(万kW) hourly column or 当日実績(5分間隔値)(万kW) five-minute column. Rows with 0 or blank actual-demand values are future or unavailable measurements and are skipped by the bridge.

solar_generation_mw.description: Solar generation actual value converted to megawatts from TEPCO's section 5 太陽光発電実績(5分間隔値)(万kW) column. The field is null for hourly section 3 rows and for five-minute rows where TEPCO publishes an empty solar cell.

solar_generation_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer solar generation actual value from TEPCO's section 5 太陽光発電実績(5分間隔値)(万kW) column. The field is null for hourly section 3 rows and for five-minute rows where TEPCO publishes an empty solar cell.

solar_share_pct.description: Solar generation percentage of electricity usage from TEPCO's section 5 太陽光発電量(電力使用量に対する割合)(%) column. The field is null for hourly section 3 rows and for five-minute rows where TEPCO publishes an empty solar-share cell.

usage_pct.description: Usage percentage from TEPCO's hourly section 3 使用率(%) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence DemandActual rows derived from section 3; it is null for five-minute rows derived from section 5. TEPCO may leave future-hour usage blank until actual demand is available.

supply_capacity_mw.description: Available supply capacity converted to megawatts from TEPCO's hourly section 3 供給力(万kW) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence rows derived from section 3; it is null for five-minute rows derived from section 5.

supply_capacity_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer supply-capacity value from TEPCO's hourly section 3 供給力(万kW) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence rows derived from section 3; it is null for five-minute rows derived from section 5.

area_code.description: Constant service-area code TEPCO assigned by this bridge for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area covered by the Electricity Forecast page.

DemandActual.description: Telemetry schema for actual TEPCO electricity demand in the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area. Hourly rows from section 3 carry usage and supply-capacity context, while five-minute rows from section 5 carry solar generation context.

DemandForecast.name: DemandForecast

date.description: Operating date from the DATE column in TEPCO's hourly same-day forecast section, normalized to ISO 8601 calendar-date form (YYYY-MM-DD). This is the first stable key component.

time.description: Local Japan Standard Time clock hour from the TIME column in TEPCO's hourly forecast section, normalized to zero-padded HH:MM form. This is the second stable key component.

datetime.description: Combined DATE and TIME converted from Japan Standard Time to UTC and serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp for cross-region analytics.

datetime_local.description: Combined DATE and TIME serialized as an RFC 3339 timestamp with +09:00 offset for the Japan Standard Time instant represented by the TEPCO CSV row.

forecast_demand_mw.description: Hourly forecast electricity demand for the Tokyo service area, converted to megawatts from TEPCO's section 3 予測値(万kW) column by multiplying by 10.

forecast_demand_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer value from TEPCO's section 3 予測値(万kW) hourly forecast column. The bridge uses this value in forecast de-duplication so revised forecasts for the same date and hour are emitted again.

usage_pct.description: Usage percentage from TEPCO's hourly section 3 使用率(%) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence DemandForecast rows derived from section 3 and can be null when TEPCO leaves future-hour usage blank until actual demand is available.

supply_capacity_mw.description: Available supply capacity converted to megawatts from TEPCO's hourly section 3 供給力(万kW) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence DemandForecast rows derived from section 3.

supply_capacity_jp_unit_value.description: Original integer supply-capacity value from TEPCO's hourly section 3 供給力(万kW) column. This field is populated only for hourly-cadence DemandForecast rows derived from section 3.

area_code.description: Constant service-area code TEPCO assigned by this bridge for the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area covered by the Electricity Forecast page.

DemandForecast.description: Hourly telemetry schema for TEPCO electricity demand forecasts in the Tokyo Electric Power Company service area, including usage and supply-capacity context from section 3.

schema.name: Info
schema.description: Reference information for the source, area, or event collection used by MQTT retained topics and AMQP consumers to discover the logical feed scope.

info_id.description: Stable identifier for the reference information record; used as the CloudEvents subject when no more specific upstream entity exists.

name.description: Human-readable name for the source, area, or event collection represented by this reference information record.

country.description: Lower-case ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or intl when the feed spans countries.

city.description: City segment used in civic-events topic routing, or null when not applicable.

category.description: Event category segment used in topic routing, or null when not applicable.

price_area.description: Energy market price area or bidding zone represented by this reference record, when applicable.

settlement_date.description: GB settlement date for Elexon retained information topics when applicable.

settlement_period.description: GB settlement period for Elexon retained information topics when applicable.

area_code.description: Electricity control area or utility service area code represented by this record when applicable.

segment.description: Ticketmaster classification segment used for wildcard topic routing, when applicable.

entity_id.description: Stable upstream entity identifier for reference topics, when applicable.

event_id.description: Stable upstream event identifier for event-scoped reference topics, when applicable.

venue_id.description: Stable venue identifier for venue-scoped civic event topics, when applicable.

schema.name: SupplyCapacity
schema.doc: Daily reference schema for TEPCO Electricity Forecast supply capability and maximum usage summary.

fields.name: date
fields.doc: Service date in ISO 8601 calendar-date form.

fields.name: time
fields.doc: Stable key time component; supply capacity uses _supply_capacity_.

fields.name: peak_supply_capacity_mw
fields.doc: Peak-time available supply capability converted from 万kW to MW.

fields.name: peak_supply_capacity_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original peak supply capability value in 万kW.

fields.name: peak_time_slot
fields.doc: Peak supply-capability time slot.

fields.name: peak_reserve_margin_pct
fields.doc: Peak-time reserve margin percentage.

fields.name: peak_usage_pct
fields.doc: Peak-time usage percentage.

fields.name: daily_max_usage_pct
fields.doc: Daily maximum usage percentage.

fields.name: daily_max_usage_time_slot
fields.doc: Time slot for the daily maximum usage percentage.

fields.name: update_datetime
fields.doc: Supply-capability update timestamp converted to UTC RFC 3339.

fields.name: update_datetime_local
fields.doc: Supply-capability update timestamp in JST RFC 3339.

fields.name: area_code
fields.doc: Constant TEPCO area code.

fields.name: area_name_jp
fields.doc: Japanese TEPCO service area name.

fields.name: area_name_en
fields.doc: English TEPCO service area name.

schema.name: PeakDemandForecast

fields.name: date
fields.doc: Operating date in ISO 8601 calendar-date form.

fields.name: time
fields.doc: Stable key time component; peak demand forecast uses _peak_forecast_.

fields.name: peak_demand_forecast_mw
fields.doc: Forecast maximum demand converted from 万kW to MW.

fields.name: peak_demand_forecast_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original forecast maximum demand value in 万kW.

fields.name: peak_time_slot
fields.doc: Forecast maximum-demand time slot.

fields.name: update_datetime
fields.doc: Peak-demand forecast update timestamp converted to UTC RFC 3339.

fields.name: update_datetime_local
fields.doc: Peak-demand forecast update timestamp in JST RFC 3339.

fields.name: area_code
fields.doc: Constant TEPCO area code.

fields.name: area_name_jp
fields.doc: Japanese TEPCO service area name.

fields.name: area_name_en
fields.doc: English TEPCO service area name.

schema.name: DemandActual
schema.doc: Actual electricity demand record from TEPCO Electricity Forecast.

fields.name: date
fields.doc: Operating date in ISO 8601 calendar-date form.

fields.name: time
fields.doc: JST HH:MM clock time and stable key component.

fields.name: datetime
fields.doc: Measurement timestamp converted to UTC RFC 3339.

fields.name: datetime_local
fields.doc: Measurement timestamp in JST RFC 3339.

fields.name: actual_demand_mw
fields.doc: Actual electricity demand converted from 万kW to MW.

fields.name: actual_demand_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original actual demand value in 万kW.

fields.name: solar_generation_mw
fields.doc: Solar generation converted from 万kW to MW for five-minute rows.

fields.name: solar_generation_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original solar generation value in 万kW for five-minute rows.

fields.name: solar_share_pct
fields.doc: Solar generation percentage of electricity usage for five-minute rows.

fields.name: usage_pct
fields.doc: Usage percentage for hourly rows.

fields.name: supply_capacity_mw
fields.doc: Supply capacity converted from 万kW to MW for hourly rows.

fields.name: supply_capacity_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original supply capacity value in 万kW for hourly rows.

fields.name: area_code
fields.doc: Constant TEPCO area code.

fields.name: time

fields.name: datetime

fields.name: datetime_local

fields.name: forecast_demand_mw

fields.name: forecast_demand_jp_unit_value

fields.name: usage_pct
fields.doc: Usage percentage for hourly rows.

fields.name: supply_capacity_mw
fields.doc: Supply capacity converted from 万kW to MW for hourly rows.

fields.name: supply_capacity_jp_unit_value
fields.doc: Original supply capacity value in 万kW for hourly rows.

fields.name: area_code
